## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected? -->
<!-- Example: "As a student, I can't filter scholarships by field of study, so I have to manually scan all results." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How do we know this feature is "done"? -->

- [ ]

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider, and why did you choose this one? -->

## Affected Areas

<!-- Check all that may be impacted -->

- [ ] Frontend (public/scripts/)
- [ ] Backend route (routes/)
- [ ] Database schema change
- [ ] Admin panel (admin/)
- [ ] New dependency required
- [ ] Security implications

## Priority

- [ ] High (blocking users or core functionality)
- [ ] Medium (improves experience significantly)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
